title: phlegmariurus catacachiensis
intro: Phlegmariurus catacachiensis, also known as Catachi Pinel, is a species of climbing fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus catacachiensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as respiratory issues, skin irritations, and wounds, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Phlegmariurus catacachiensis include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used externally to apply its medicinal properties to the skin or taken internally to benefit from its health benefits.
